title: Vexxed Visuals: TerraFirmaCraft
description: Bringing TerraFirmaCraft for 1.21 closer to the aesthetic of the updated vanilla textures
body:
REQUIRES THE TERRAFIRMACRAFT MOD FOR 1.21

 

This pack, an update on my previous for 1.12 TFC:TNG, attempts to bring TerraFirmaCraft closer in visuals to the new textures mainly done by Jappa for the more recent versions of Minecraft. Almost every texture in the mod has been redone, as well as hundreds of block and item models and new variants for specific blocks.

 

Main features include:

• New textures for almost every TFC (and some addons) block, item, armor, and some entities.

• New models for dozens of blocks and items.

• New colormaps for rainfall, temperature, and seasons.

• New GUIs for almost every tile entity such as anvils, the blast furnace, crucibles, and more as well as a new player inventory tab interface.

• Variants and natural texture rotation for many blocks you will find in the world.

 

Credits:

• Vexxel - discord @vexxel - https://github.com/Vexxel : Most of the work, textures, custom models
• TFC:TNG Team and the TFC Discord : Base textures to modify and tweak
• SixFootBlue/Blue Haven : Some textures raw and edited from Itembound
• Jappa/Mojang Team : Base textures raw and edited from Minecraft

• Metallurgy Team : Inspiration and loose templates for armor inventory item icons
